# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

# Linkerd Zero-Trust Service Mesh Configuration
# Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices

---
# =============================================================================
# NAMESPACE CONFIGURATION
# =============================================================================
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  annotations:
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"

---
# =============================================================================
# SERVICE ACCOUNTS - Each service gets its own identity
# =============================================================================
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: audit-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service

---
# =============================================================================
# SERVER RESOURCES - Define ports and protocol for each service
# =============================================================================

# --- API Gateway Server (port 8443) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
  annotations:
    description: "API Gateway ingress endpoint - TLS terminated by mesh"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# API Gateway admin/health port - restricted
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- User Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# User Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# User Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- Order Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Order Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Order Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- Payment Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Payment Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- Inventory Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Inventory Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Inventory Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- Notification Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Notification Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# --- Audit Service Server (port 8080) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Audit Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Audit Service admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# =============================================================================
# SERVER AUTHORIZATION RESOURCES
# Explicit allowlist: only named service accounts can reach specific servers
# Communication map:
#   api-gateway -> user-service, order-service, inventory-service
#   order-service -> payment-service, inventory-service, notification-service
#   payment-service -> notification-service
#   order-service -> user-service (validate user)
#   All services -> audit-service (audit logging)
#   Kubelet -> admin ports (health checks)
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# API GATEWAY AUTHORIZATIONS
# Only the ingress controller (from ingress-nginx namespace) can reach the
# API gateway. No other meshed service should call the gateway directly.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-ingress
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    # Allow traffic from the ingress controller namespace
    # This uses unauthenticated identity since ingress may not be meshed
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx
          namespace: ingress-nginx

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# USER SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# Only api-gateway and order-service can call user-service
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# User service gRPC - only api-gateway and order-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ORDER SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# Only api-gateway can call order-service
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PAYMENT SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# Only order-service can call payment-service (strict financial boundary)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INVENTORY SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# api-gateway (read) and order-service (reserve/update) can call inventory
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NOTIFICATION SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# order-service and payment-service can send notifications
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# AUDIT SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS
# All services can write audit logs (explicit allowlist of each service account)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-service-allow-all-services-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices
        - name: user-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-service-allow-all-services-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: audit-service
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices
        - name: user-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ADMIN / HEALTH CHECK AUTHORIZATIONS
# Allow kubelet (unauthenticated, non-meshed) to reach admin ports for
# liveness and readiness probes only. These are network-scoped to the
# cluster's internal CIDR.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
      - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# =============================================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICIES (v1alpha1) - Fine-grained HTTP route-level controls
# These supplement ServerAuthorization with route-specific restrictions
# =============================================================================

# --- Restrict payment-service to POST only (no GET/DELETE from order-service) ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-charge-route
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments/refund
          method: POST

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-route-authz
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-charge-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# --- Restrict user-service read routes for api-gateway, write for order-service ---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-route
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: GET

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-authz
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-read-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: user-service-read-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# =============================================================================
# NETWORK POLICIES - Defense in depth at the network layer
# Even if Linkerd policy is misconfigured, NetworkPolicy provides a backstop
# =============================================================================
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-dns
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-control-plane
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
# Allow intra-namespace communication (meshed traffic only)
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-intra-namespace-meshed
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: microservices
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: microservices

---
# Allow ingress controller to reach api-gateway
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443

---
# Allow kubelet health checks to admin ports
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-health-checks
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9990

---
# Payment service: only accept from order-service pods
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-strict-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
    - ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9990
